text:
is a book published by Kadokawa Shoten on 27 February 1997.

Overview

A lonely body, an empty heart, a soul dwelling in only one among many containers. Is life or death reflected in her eyes?. This book is a collection of photo poems written by voice actress Megumi Hayashibara about the world of "Neon Genesis Evangelion".
